param.value: "Verify user can navigate to Hotels page"
"Click any hotel card in Flash Deals and validate Download App popup is displayed"
"Search hotels with city, dates, rooms and adults using excel data"
"Search hotels with children added but child age not selected"

exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:67) at com.redbus.testing.stepdefinition.HotelsStepDefinition.verify_child_age_selection_validation_message_is_displayed(HotelsStepDefinition.java:166) at ✽.Verify child age selection validation message is displayed(file:///E:/Redbus_Selenium_UI_Framework/./src/test/java/com/redbus/testing/featurefiles/SearchHotels.feature:40)

param.value: "Search hotels with children and child age using excel data"
"Apply hotel filters and validate clear all button with filtered results"
